scope: tensor-free H1a repair of low-noise coordinate scaling and schedule-matched reverse integration; no H1b-H6

coordinate_probability_path.state_space: product unit torus modulo common translation
coordinate_probability_path.target: sigma(t) times exact conditional wrapped-normal score in the translation-horizontal tangent
coordinate_probability_path.objective_equivalence: unweighted scaled-score MSE equals variance-weighted raw-score MSE
coordinate_probability_path.reverse_conversion: raw score equals scaled score divided by sigma(t)
coordinate_probability_path.sampler_grid: 100 uniform increments of the linear torus variance

decision_rule.boundary: Passing authorizes only a separately frozen full tensor-free H1a benchmark. It does not authorize H1b, tensor conditioning, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
